title: Two Papers Accepted by CVPR'26
content: Two papers (one first-author) have been accepted by CVPR'26!

title: Paper Accepted by IEEE TDSC
content: One co-authored paper entitled "Decoder Gradient Shields: A Family of Provable and High-Fidelity Methods Against Gradient-Based Box-Free Watermark Removal" has been accepted by IEEE TDSC!

title: Paper Accepted by IEEE TMC
content: One co-authored paper entitled "CP-uniGuard: A Unified, Probability-Agnostic, and Adaptive Framework for Malicious Agent Detection and Defense in Multi-Agent Embodied Perception Systems" has been accepted by IEEE TMC!

title: Two Papers Accepted by NeurIPS'25
content: Two co-authored papers was accepted by NeurIPS'25 (one spotlight), congratulations!

title: CityUHK OAPA Scholarship Award
content: I was awarded the Outstanding Academic Performance Award (OAPA) Scholarship by City University of Hong Kong!

title: Paper Accepted by IEEE GLOBECOM'25
content: One co-authored paper entitled "Task-Aware Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning of Large Pre-Trained Models at the Edge" has been accepted by IEEE GLOBECOM'25!

title: Paper Accepted by IEEE JSAC
content: One co-authored paper entitled "R-ACP: Real-Time Adaptive Collaborative Perception Leveraging Robust Task-Oriented Communications" has been accepted by IEEE JSAC!

title: IEEE RAS Student Grant Award
content: I was awarded the IEEE Robotics and Automation Society (RAS) Student Grant Award (Amount: 1500 USD) for my conference travel to ICRA'25!

title: Baidu Paddle Open Source Star
content: Selected as Baidu Paddle Open Source Star (only 10 recipients annually)!

title: University Special Scholarship
content: Awarded the University Special Scholarship (only 10 recipients across the whole university)!

title: Paper Accepted by IEEE BIBM
content: One paper has been accepted by IEEE BIBM!
